name: Gallagher
desc: A security officer of the Bloodhound Family at Penacony. He is always courteous toward visiting guests but keeps his vigilance about him. He seems to carry a weight of a complicated past, yet he never voluntarily divulges any details.

1.name: Salty Dog
1.desc: When entering the battle, Gallagher regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy and increases Effect RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Lion's Tail
2.desc: When using the Skill, dispels <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from the designated ally. At the same time, increases their Effect RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

3.name: Corpse Reviver
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Last Word
4.desc: Extends the duration of the Besotted state inflicted by Gallagher's Ultimate by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

5.name: Death in the Afternoon
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Blood and Sand
6.desc: Increases Gallagher's Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

130101.name: Corkage Fee
130101.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gallagher's ATK to one designated enemy target.
130101.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

130102.name: Special Brew
130102.desc: Immediately heals a target ally for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> HP.

130103.name: Champagne Etiquette
130103.desc: Inflicts Besotted on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). At the same time, deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gallagher's ATK to all enemies, and enhances his next Basic ATK to Nectar Blitz.
130103.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Inflicts Besotted</color> on all enemies and deals Fire DMG to them at the same time. Enhances the next Basic ATK to Nectar Blitz.

130104.name: Tipsy Tussle
130104.desc: The Besotted state makes targets receive <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> more <u>Break DMG</u>. Every time a Besotted target gets attacked by an ally, the attacking ally's HP is restored by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.
130104.simple_desc: The Besotted state <color=#f29e38ff>makes targets receive more <u>Break DMG</u></color>. Every time the target gets attacked by an ally character, <color=#f29e38ff>the attacker's HP is restored</color>.

10000014.name: Break DMG
10000014.desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

130106.name: Attack
130106.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130107.name: Artisan Elixir
130107.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, inflicts Besotted on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). And deals Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Gallagher's ATK to all enemies.
130107.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, <color=#f29e38ff>inflicts Besotted</color> to all enemies and deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies.

130108.name: Nectar Blitz
130108.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gallagher's ATK to one designated enemy target. Reduces the target's ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
130108.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy and reduces ATK.

1.point_desc: Increases this unit's Outgoing Healing by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Break Effect, up to a maximum Outgoing Healing increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
After using the Ultimate, immediately <u>advances action</u> for this unit by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: When Gallagher uses Nectar Blitz to attack Besotted enemies, the HP Restore effect of his Talent will also apply to teammates for this time.
